description_long: This object consists of three wooden storage boxes arranged side by side, each with a weathered, grayish-brown plank texture. The boxes are cubic in shape, with visible wood grain and horizontal slats on all sides, giving them a rustic, utilitarian appearance. Each box features a paper label or sticker on the front, with some labels showing barcodes and text, suggesting they are used for shipping or inventory. The tops of the boxes are flat and appear to be removable or liftable, with no visible hinges or handles. The boxes rest on a black grid mat with red lines and a printed label reading 'MADE IN DIGITAL ARTS & ENTERTAINMENT.' The overall design suggests these boxes are intended for storage or transport in urban or industrial settings.
description: Three weathered wooden storage boxes with paper labels, flat tops, and a rustic, utilitarian design, arranged on a black grid mat.
description_view_0: Front view showing three wooden boxes with visible paper labels and barcodes on their front faces.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wooden slat texture and the depth of the boxes, with no visible labels or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back sides of the boxes, which are unmarked and feature the same wooden slat construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wooden texture and the arrangement of the boxes.
